name: Beef and Broccoli Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into 1-inch strips.
2. In a bowl, mix together the soy sauce, dry white wine, minced garlic, and ground ginger. Marinate the meat strips for 1 hour.
3. Heat the safflower oil in a skillet over moderate heat.
4. Remove the meat from the marinade and brown it quickly on both sides.
5. Add the broccoli to the skillet and cook until it is easily pierced with a fork.
6. In a separate bowl, combine the beef broth, cornstarch, and reserved marinade. Stir this mixture into the skillet.
7. Cook until the sauce thickens.
(213 calories per serving) 1 serving=1 Vegetable exchange 3 Lean Meat exchanges 1/2 Fat exchange This dish is excellent served with rice. Remember, 1/2 cup cooked rice=1 Bread exchange.
